title: Principal Frontend Developer at Mphasis Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Mphasis Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mphasis Digital Technologies in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mphasis Digital Technologies:
Mphasis Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis Digital Technologies!
